summary: 13 film announcements, 10 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Treasure Island
film.announcement: Sony Pictures is circling Ridley Scott's Treasure Island package starring Hugh Jackman.

film.title: Ali G: Who Iz I?
film.announcement: Sacha Baron Cohen's secret Ali G movie is being released in October from Amazon MGM Studios.

film.title: Days of Thunder 2
film.talent: Tom Cruise, Director: Jonathan Levine (in talks)
film.announcement: Jonathan Levine is in talks to direct Paramount's Days of Thunder sequel starring Tom Cruise.

film.title: Lou Gehrig
film.talent: Glen Powell, Director: Richard Linklater, Producer: Lorne Michaels
film.announcement: Glen Powell and Richard Linklater are reteaming for a Lou Gehrig biopic at Universal with Lorne Michaels producing.

film.title: Clayface
film.announcement: DC Studios' Clayface film trailer released, featuring Tom Rhys Harries as the Batman villain.

film.title: Fred Astaire Biopic
film.announcement: Tom Holland shares update on Fred Astaire biopic project, stating he wants to perform dance scenes as continuous takes.

film.title: The Girl in the River
film.announcement: Thriller The Girl in the River starring Tiffany Haddish and Devon Sawa gets late summer release and trailer.

film.title: Misty Green
film.announcement: Chris Rock follows a Hollywood actress fighting for her second act in the A24 industry drama Misty Green.

film.title: Stuffed
film.announcement: Jodie Comer and Harry Melling star in taxidermy musical Stuffed, which leads TIFF Discovery lineup of rising filmmakers.

film.title: It Ends
film.announcement: Neon's endless roadtrip horror film It Ends gets trailer and is coming to theaters.

film.title: Someone's Daughter
film.announcement: François Arnaud stars in striking rape-revenge thriller Someone's Daughter.

film.title: A Sad and Beautiful World
film.announcement: A Sad and Beautiful World is a romantic drama set against wartorn Beirut.

film.title: Hadestown: The Musical
film.announcement: Broadway hit Hadestown: The Musical is coming to movie theaters.

tv.title: 13 Going On 30 Reboot
tv.talent: Taylor Zakhar Perez, Owen Thiele, Nasim Pedrad, Supriya Ganesh
tv.announcement: Taylor Zakhar Perez, Owen Thiele, Nasim Pedrad, and Supriya Ganesh are among final cast additions to Netflix's 13 Going On 30 reboot.

tv.title: Parasyte: Tamiya
tv.announcement: Director Yeon Sang-ho returns to the Parasyte universe with new Netflix series Parasyte: Tamiya starring Shioli Kutsuna.

tv.title: Protective Custody
tv.talent: Benicio Del Toro, Creator: Ben Stiller and Mike Judge
tv.announcement: Benicio Del Toro is set to star in Apple comedy series Protective Custody from creators Ben Stiller and Mike Judge.

tv.title: Laird
tv.announcement: Kenneth Branagh stars in Scottish Highland drama Laird ordered by Paramount+ from creator Jez Butterworth and 101 Studios.

tv.title: Mt. Mystic
tv.announcement: Johnny Knoxville joins the cast of Mt. Mystic comedy series.

tv.title: Stewie
tv.talent: Seth MacFarlane, Kenan Thompson, Vanessa Bayer, Melissa O'Neil, Mike Henry
tv.announcement: Voice cast set for Family Guy spinoff Stewie featuring Kenan Thompson, Vanessa Bayer, Melissa O'Neil, Mike Henry, and others alongside creator Seth MacFarlane.

tv.title: Chicks
tv.talent: Ellen Pompeo, Jodie Whittaker, Louis Cancelmi
tv.announcement: Louis Cancelmi joins Ellen Pompeo and Jodie Whittaker in Hulu dramedy pilot Chicks.

tv.title: Dracula
tv.talent: Jonathan Bailey, Ella Purnell, Aimee Lou Wood, Maggie Gyllenhaal
tv.announcement: Jonathan Bailey, Ella Purnell, Aimee Lou Wood, and Maggie Gyllenhaal are cast in Audible's Dracula production.

tv.title: Pompeii: Out of Time with Tom Hiddleston
tv.announcement: Documentary Pompeii: Out of Time with Tom Hiddleston is coming to Disney+.

tv.title: Disney Worldbuilders
tv.talent: Leslie Iwerks (director), James Cameron, Kevin Feige, Jon Favreau
tv.announcement: Disney Worldbuilders documentary directed by Leslie Iwerks and featuring James Cameron, Kevin Feige, and Jon Favreau is set to premiere on Disney+.
